title: No PSCI 2223 lecture today due to illness
content:
Dear PSCI 2223 Intro to IR Students,

Unfortunately, I woke up feeling quite sick this morning so we won't be having our lecture today, Wednesday 12/3. Please work on the following instead: 

1. Please work on and submit your Research Report Assignment, which is due by 5 pm today.

2. Per the university schedule, we are having a lecture meeting on Friday, 12/5. We'll finish talking about compliance with International Law and then do the exam review. For the latter, please look over your lecture notes prior to the class and come prepared to ask questions on Friday.

Best,

Dr. Tir
contentText:
Dear PSCI 2223 Intro to IR Students,
Unfortunately, I woke up feeling quite sick this morning so we won't be having our lecture today, Wednesday 12/3. Please work on the following instead: 
1. Please work on and submit your Research Report Assignment, which is due by 5 pm today.
2. Per the university schedule, we are having a lecture meeting on Friday, 12/5. We'll finish talking about compliance with International Law and then do the exam review. For the latter, please look over your lecture notes prior to the class and come prepared to ask questions on Friday.

author: Jaroslav Tir
